webhooks.description: Primary ac-pulse web UI for the success-rep portfolio, action planner, and account mapping workflow.
Snowflake JWT smoke test — gated by X-Service-Key. Bypasses CF Access so other agents (and curl) can hit it via hooks.ac-spark.com.

Cross-agent dedupe lookup. POST {email:'...'} with X-Service-Key. Returns the customer-footprint shape (is_customer, exact matches, by-record-type, summary). Backed by Zapier MCP today; will swap to direct Snowflake once the egress IP is whitelisted.
Dependency readiness check — pings Snowflake. Useful for post-deploy validation. No auth required (read-only diagnostics).
Read-only success-rep book-of-business command center. Pass rep_name as a query parameter. Returns portfolio summary and prioritized account queue from Snowflake via the configured backend.
Dry-run customer success action planner. POST rep_name, optional account_ids, and limit. Returns deterministic planned tasks/notes without writing to ActiveCampaign.
Guarded customer success action writer. POST rep_name, selected dedupe_keys, optional account_ids, and confirm:true. Writes reviewed actions as ActiveCampaign account notes only.
Read-only Snowflake-to-ActiveCampaign account mapping preview. Requires X-Service-Key. Returns matched, ambiguous, unmatched, and CSV mapping rows for review.
